title: Monoon macranthum
taxonomy: Monoon macranthum belongs to the family Annonaceae. It is a species of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. The plant is classified under the genus Monoon, which is a group of plants that are closely related to the genus Polyalthia. Monoon macranthum is a medium-sized tree with a wide distribution in countries such as Malaysia and Thailand. The classification of Monoon macranthum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Annonaceae family.
